description: Call involving offer negotiation between realtor and client or other party

client_interests_clear.description: Agent demonstrates a clear understanding of the client's priorities beyond price — conditions, timeline, certainty.

strategic_framing.description: Agent frames the negotiation from a position of strength, not desperation.

manages_client_emotions.description: Agent keeps the client calm and focused on the goal, not reactive to the other party.

counter_strategy_explained.description: Agent explains the reasoning behind any counter-offer strategy clearly.

alternatives_presented.description: Agent presents at least one alternative scenario if the primary offer fails.

decision_ownership.description: Agent empowers the client to make the decision while providing a clear recommendation.

next_steps_confirmed.description: Agent confirms what happens next and by when.
